title: Kitchen Tongs for Cooking Grill & BBQ, Kyraton Stainless Steel 9" Cooking Tongs Heat Resistant Handle Non Slip, Kitchen Tongs with Silicon Tips for Salad,Ice,Fry, Serving,Oven. (Silver)
features: The 1 piece barbecue tongs are made of high quality stainless steel and food grade silicone ,with long stainless steel handles and clamps to keep your hands away from the heat source.

The 1 piece 9 inch kitchen tong make it easier for you to grill, and long handles to keep you safe from fire Source for a relaxing and enjoyable BBQ, food grade silicone is BPA free, non-toxic and tasteless, so you can use this kitchen tong to make delicious food with confidence.

This kitchen tongs uses a advanced design with a convenient is closed for easy to drying and storage, and a non-slip handle provides a strong grip, allowing you to handle food more safely and protect your hands from being scalded.
Suitable for many occasions, great for BBQ, dinner, cooking, stir fry, salad, dessert, can easily flip or pick up fish, meat, steak, vegetables, burgers, bacon, bread, pizza, etc.
The Kyraton high-quality kitchen tongs have large hanging loops at the end for easy to clean and store.Dishwasher safe
